who: legal secretaries in law firms managing 10-20 client appointments per week
offer: For legal secretaries in law firms processing 10-20 client appointments per week, missed appointments cause client dissatisfaction. We automate appointment reminders instead of manual scheduling and reminders via email or phone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for legal secretaries seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to legal secretaries with demo video
Participate in community forums for legal secretaries
try_it: Let users try manual appointment entry and reminders for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Default reminder schedule presets for convenience
Allow CSV import for existing client data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
